description_long: This object is a stylized potted palm plant with a slender, upright trunk and several arching fronds radiating outward. The fronds are composed of long, narrow, pointed leaflets arranged symmetrically along the central stem, giving the plant a lush and tropical appearance. The trunk is segmented and tapers slightly as it rises, mimicking the natural growth pattern of palm species. The leaves are a vibrant green with lighter highlights along the central veins, while the trunk is a muted green with subtle striping. There is no visible pot or container at the base, suggesting a minimal or abstract representation. The overall form is airy and open, with ample negative space between the fronds.
description: A stylized potted palm plant with a segmented green trunk and radiating, pointed fronds. The leaves are vibrant green and the trunk is slender and upright.
description_view_0: The palm plant is seen with three main fronds extending outward, showing the full spread of the leaves and the segmented trunk.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side profile of the plant, with the fronds overlapping and the trunk slightly angled, giving a sense of depth.
description_view_2: The plant appears more compact from this angle, with the fronds overlapping more closely and the trunk partially obscured.
description_view_3: A nearly symmetrical view of the plant, with the fronds evenly distributed and the trunk centered.
attribute_plant_species: palm (Arecaceae family, likely Areca palm or similar)
